rationale: Assistant gives a direct situated recommendation immediately: with 30,000 km/year and home charging, choose新能源/especially纯电. It grounds the judgment in operating cost and maintenance, and clearly states flip/exception conditions: frequent 500km+ trips, very cold winters, high highway share, uncertain long-distance single-car use, where PHEV/EREV or avoiding pure EV may be better. This is not an abstract neutral comparison.
